name: Research Workspace
description: Primary legal research workspace for searching case law, inspecting case detail with citation graphs, and drafting research memos side-by-side with supporting briefs.

page_briefs.search: Case law search page. Top region hosts a search-filter-bar with jurisdiction, date range, court level, and practice area facets. Main region renders a data-table of case results with columns for case name, citation, court, year, and relevance score. The right aside panel shows a citation-graph network visualization of how results cite one another, helping researchers identify seminal cases and citation clusters.
page_briefs.case-detail: Single case detail view. Main region shows a case-brief-card in research preset with full metadata, holding, reasoning, and pull quotes. The right aside renders a hierarchical citation-graph tracing authority upward to cited precedents and downward to subsequent cases that cite this decision, with signals indicating positive or negative treatment.
page_briefs.research-memo: Split research memo drafting view. Main region hosts a doc-editor for composing the memo with structured sections for question presented, brief answer, facts, discussion, and conclusion. The right aside stacks minimal case-brief-cards for each cited authority so the writer can reference holdings without leaving the page.
